title: smart-fps-booster
description: Smart FPS Booster is a client-side Minecraft utility mod that helps manage performance by applying configurable optimization profiles and dynamically adjusting selected settings.
body:
# Smart FPS Booster

A client-side Minecraft performance utility mod that dynamically manages selected video and performance settings, provides real-time performance monitoring, and offers configurable optimization profiles.

Smart FPS Booster does **not modify Minecraft’s engine** and does **not guarantee specific FPS increases**. Performance results depend on hardware, installed mods, and game settings.


## Keybinds

| Key | Action |
|-----|--------|
| F8  | Open performance dashboard |
| F9  | Toggle dynamic optimization |
| F10 | Cycle profiles |

---

![Banner](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devxkamlesh/smart-fps-booster/main/images/banner.png)

---

## Why Smart FPS Booster?

Minecraft performance tuning often requires manual configuration and frequent adjustments depending on gameplay situations. Smart FPS Booster simplifies this process by:

- Applying predefined optimization profiles  
- Dynamically adjusting supported client settings (optional)  
- Displaying live performance data  
- Integrating with popular optimization mods  

The goal is to **stabilize performance, reduce stuttering, and simplify configuration**, especially on low-end or mid-range systems.

---

## Intended For

- Players on low-end or mid-range PCs and laptops  
- PvP players who prefer consistent frame timing  
- Players experiencing FPS drops or stuttering  
- Anyone who wants automated client-side performance management  

---

## Features

### Optimization Profiles

![Profiles](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devxkamlesh/smart-fps-booster/main/images/profiles.png)

Four configurable profiles are included:

- **Max FPS** – prioritizes performance-oriented settings  
- **Balanced** – default mix of visuals and performance  
- **Quality** – higher visual settings with moderate optimization  
- **Battery Saver** – reduces GPU/CPU load for laptops  

Profiles modify only supported client-side video and performance settings.

---

### Live Performance Dashboard

![Dashboard](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devxkamlesh/smart-fps-booster/main/images/dashboard.png)

Accessible via **F8**:

- Current FPS display  
- FPS history graph (last 60 seconds)  
- Memory usage indicator  
- Session history (up to 10 sessions)  
- Hardware tier estimation  
- Built-in benchmark tool  

---

### Dynamic Optimization (Optional)

When enabled, the mod can adjust selected settings based on:

- Player movement  
- Combat situations  
- Heavy visual scenes (particles, explosions, large farms)  
- Current dimension (Overworld / Nether / End)  

All changes remain within normal Minecraft client configuration options.

---

### Setting Locks

You may prevent the mod from changing specific settings:

- Render Distance  
- Graphics Mode  

This allows optimization while preserving your preferred visual configuration.

---

### Lag Spike Indicator

Optional visual alert when a sudden FPS drop is detected (brief red screen flash).  
This is informational only and does not affect gameplay mechanics.

---

## Mod Compatibility

Smart FPS Booster detects and adapts behavior when used with:

- Sodium  
- Lithium  
- Iris Shaders  
- Mod Menu  

Compatibility is automatic when these mods are present.

---

## Installation

1. Install Fabric Loader  
2. Install Fabric API  
3. Place the mod `.jar` into the `mods` folder  
4. Launch the game  

---

## Important Notes

- Client-side only  
- Safe to use on servers  
- Does not bypass hardware limitations  
- Does not guarantee FPS improvements  
- Designed to assist configuration and performance monitoring  

---
